marketing.home.reviews.eyebrow: Don’t just take our word for it
marketing.home.reviews.title: Loved by hosts who want beautiful event sharing without friction
marketing.home.reviews.description: Warm, candid reviews from people who needed something elegant enough for guests and simple enough for everyone to use.
marketing.home.reviews.rating_summary: Rated 4.9 by hosts across weddings, parties, and public events
marketing.home.reviews.testimonials.1.qu: We put the QR code on every reception table and had hundreds of candid photos by the end of dinner. Guests kept saying how easy it was.
marketing.home.reviews.testimonials.2.qu: The live wall was the surprise hit. People uploaded more just to see their pictures show up on the screen a minute later.
marketing.home.reviews.testimonials.3.qu: It felt premium without feeling technical. That is incredibly rare with event tools.
marketing.home.reviews.testimonials.4.qu: We used it for a two-day conference and it gave us a beautiful attendee-powered recap with almost no admin overhead.

marketing.home.blog.title: Fresh ideas for making guest photo sharing work beautifully
marketing.home.blog.description: Helpful, practical guidance for hosts, planners, venues, and anyone trying to get more guests to actually contribute.
marketing.home.blog.posts.1.title: Where to place your event QR code so more guests actually upload
marketing.home.blog.posts.1.body: The tiny placement choices that make photo sharing feel obvious instead of optional.
marketing.home.blog.posts.2.title: How to turn guest photos into a digital guestbook people revisit
marketing.home.blog.posts.2.body: Mix photos, wishes, captions, and a slideshow into something that feels worth keeping.
marketing.home.blog.posts.3.title: Why live photo walls create better event energy than passive displays
marketing.home.blog.posts.3.body: Screens become participation magnets when guests know their upload can show up in seconds.
marketing.home.faq.title: Everything hosts ask before launching their first event
marketing.home.faq.description: Simple answers to the questions that come up most often.
marketing.home.faq.items.1.question: Do guests need to download an app?
marketing.home.faq.items.1.answer: No. Guests open the event link or scan the QR code and upload directly from their browser.
marketing.home.faq.items.2.question: Can I download all guests’ photos and videos?
marketing.home.faq.items.2.answer: Yes. Hosts can export the entire collection in one organized download after the event.
marketing.home.faq.items.3.question: Why is this better than generic sharing apps?
marketing.home.faq.items.3.answer: It is designed for events first: easier guest onboarding, prettier albums, QR access, and an optional live photo wall.
marketing.home.faq.items.4.question: Can I print the QR code on signs?
marketing.home.faq.items.4.answer: Absolutely. It works great on welcome signs, table cards, programs, badges, and posters.
marketing.home.faq.items.5.question: Can multi-day events use it?
marketing.home.faq.items.5.answer: Yes. It works well for weddings, retreats, festivals, conferences, and any event that stretches across multiple days.
marketing.home.cta.title: Turn every guest into part of the memory
marketing.home.cta.description: Launch your digital album, share one link or QR code, and let the best candid moments find their way to you automatically.
marketing.pricing.meta.title: Pricing
marketing.pricing.meta.description: Choose the right event plan for uploads, active access, customization, and moderation.
marketing.pricing.hero.title: Choose the plan that fits your event best
marketing.pricing.hero.description: Every plan includes the QR album, live wall, and no-app guest flow. Choose the package that matches your event size, retention needs, and owner controls.
marketing.pricing.guarantee.title: ✅ Money Back Guarantee.
marketing.pricing.guarantee.description: If you ended up not using :appName at your event (for whatever reason), you'll get your money back according to our

marketing.pricing.empty: Pricing is being finalized. Check back shortly for published event plans.

marketing.pricing.compare.title: See what changes as your event grows
marketing.pricing.compare.description: The comparison below keeps the essentials visible without turning the page into a spreadsheet.
marketing.pricing.refund.title: Fair Refund Policy
marketing.pricing.refund.subtitle: Learn more how our refund process works.
marketing.pricing.refund.description: Happy clients means everything to us. That's why we offer 100% money-back guarantee in case you ended up not using :appName at your event. For whatever reason. No questions asked.
marketing.pricing.refund.contact: To request a refund, send us an email or reach out in the chat bubble. No complicated process.
marketing.pricing.common_features.title: All plans come with the essentials guests actually use
marketing.pricing.common_features.live_w: A beautiful slideshow of the photos and videos uploaded by you and your guests during the event.
marketing.pricing.common_features.digita: Everything is saved in a beautiful digital album that is easy to revisit and share.
marketing.pricing.common_features.no_app: Guests open the link or scan the QR code and start sharing instantly in the browser.
marketing.pricing.common_features.custom: Every event gets controls to shape the album experience and make it feel intentional.
marketing.pricing.common_features.captio: Guests can add context, wishes, and personality to every photo, video, or text post.
marketing.pricing.common_features.privat: Your event stays private to the people you choose to invite and share with.
marketing.pricing.footer_note: Prices are in EUR. All plans are subject to our Terms of Use and Fair Usage Policy.
marketing.pricing.professionals.descript: Event organizer or running multiple events? Check out EventSmart for Professionals for plans built for ongoing event work.
marketing.pricing.highlights.1.title: Clear package choices
marketing.pricing.highlights.1.descripti: Every plan is easy to understand without making hosts decode vague SaaS jargon.
marketing.pricing.highlights.2.title: Built for confidence
marketing.pricing.highlights.2.descripti: Limits, retention, and active access stay visible from the start so there are fewer surprises later.
marketing.pricing.highlights.3.title: Start small, scale up
marketing.pricing.highlights.3.descripti: Launch a birthday on Free, move to Plus for weddings, or unlock Pro for larger and more demanding events.
marketing.pricing.catalog.free.descripti: Great for birthdays, family gatherings, and other small events or occasions.
marketing.pricing.catalog.free.customiza: Basic customization options for a simple, clean event setup.
marketing.pricing.catalog.free.quality: All uploads are saved in good quality
Up to 100 uploads of photos and videos
The total number of photos and videos that you and your guests can upload to the event.
There is no guest cap on the event link or QR code experience.
The time a photo or video stays on the platform from the moment it is uploaded before it is deleted.
A lighter set of appearance controls for shaping the album without full branding tools.
Active for 24 hours from the event date
The time during which you and your guests can keep uploading after the event date starts.
Uploads are stored in good quality for lightweight events and quick sharing.
Download all photos and videos at once
ZIP download of the full event collection is not included on Free.
Manual approval and moderation controls are not included on Free.
marketing.pricing.catalog.plus.descripti: Perfect for small weddings, celebrations, and other mid-size events.
marketing.pricing.catalog.plus.customiza: Better customization options including logo support and a more polished guest-facing setup.
marketing.pricing.catalog.plus.quality: All uploads are saved in high quality
Up to 500 uploads of photos and videos
A larger upload allowance for weddings and busier guest participation.
Every guest can still join without a participant cap.
The album keeps uploads available for a longer post-event window.
Improved customization such as event logos and a stronger branded setup.
Active for 1 month from the event date
Guests can keep uploading across a longer celebration window after the event date starts.
Uploads are stored in high quality for a stronger final album.
Download all photos and videos at once
Create a ZIP archive of the approved event album from the owner dashboard.
Manual moderation tools are not included on Plus.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.descriptio: Best for big weddings, conferences, concerts, parties, and public events.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.customizat: Advanced customization with app-brand removal, custom colors, logos, and backgrounds for a fully branded event.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.quality: All uploads are saved in high quality
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.u: Unlimited uploads of photos and videos
No hard upload cap for normal usage. Subject to the fair usage policy.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.g: Large public and high-volume events can keep the same simple guest flow.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.r: A long retention window for larger productions and public events.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.c: Remove EventSmart branding and customize colors, logos, and backgrounds for a fully branded event.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.a: Active for 3 months from the event date
Uploads stay open much longer for conferences, festivals, and longer event programs.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.q: Uploads are stored in high quality with the most generous event access tier.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.d: Download all photos and videos at once
Build ZIP exports of the event collection whenever the owner needs them.
marketing.pricing.catalog.pro.features.m: Approve what appears on the event, keep tighter control over uploads, and manage more sensitive public-facing events.

invitations.moments_description: Ceremony, reception, and the main places for the day.
invitations.response_help: Your answer updates the host's guest list right away.
invitations.success_body: Thank you. The planner can now see your attendance details.
invitations.accept_help: Choose this if you are joining the event.
invitations.decline_help: Choose this if you cannot attend.
invitations.how_many_hint: Use this to tell the host how many people are actually coming.
invitations.guest_names_help: If more people are coming with you, list their first names here so the host knows who is included.
invitations.note_placeholder: Share anything the planner should know.
invitations.accept_modal_description: Share the final details for your group, then send the RSVP when everything looks right.
invitations.maybe_modal_title: That is not a real option
invitations.maybe_modal_description: This button is here only for dramatic effect. We still need a yes or a no.
invitations.maybe_meme_bottom: WE STILL NEED A YES OR NO
invitations.maybe_fallback_body: Drop your Sarim Akhtar meme at /invitation-memes/angry.png and this card will use it automatically.
invitations.decline_modal_description: If you cannot come, confirm it here so the planner can update the guest ledger.
invitations.decline_fallback_body: Drop your sad meme at /invitation-memes/sad.png and this card will use it automatically.
invitations.decline_note: We are genuinely sorry you will not be there. If this is final, confirm it and the host will update the guest list right away.
marketing.home.simple.hero.title: Show the product fast. Explain it in one glance.
marketing.home.simple.hero.description: EventSmart helps guests join quickly, upload from their phones, and see photos in the album and on the live wall. The public site should prove that visually, not bury it in text.
marketing.home.simple.proof.1: Guests join with a QR code or 4-character album code.
marketing.home.simple.proof.2: The live wall opens on a TV faster with short wall links.
marketing.home.simple.proof.3: Business teams can top up credits and launch client events from one dashboard.
marketing.home.simple.steps.1.title: Create the event fast
marketing.home.simple.steps.1.body: Choose a plan, set the date, and get your album plus wall ready in one flow.
marketing.home.simple.steps.2.title: Guests join without downloading an app
marketing.home.simple.steps.2.body: Share the QR or the short album code. Guests land straight in the upload flow on mobile.
marketing.home.simple.steps.3.title: Photos land in the album and on the wall
marketing.home.simple.steps.3.body: Hosts keep the dashboard, guests keep the upload flow, and the TV wall stays easy to open with the short wall link.
marketing.home.simple.examples.1.title: Album access
marketing.home.simple.examples.1.body: Explain the 4-character album code and show the exact mobile entry screen.
marketing.home.simple.examples.2.title: Wall access
marketing.home.simple.examples.2.body: Show the short wall link and the TV-friendly wall screen so people understand the new flow immediately.
marketing.home.simple.examples.3.title: Business billing
marketing.home.simple.examples.3.body: Show how credit top-ups, billing history, and multi-event creation work for professional users.
marketing.home.simple.updates.1.title: Album codes are now easier to share
marketing.home.simple.updates.1.descript: Guests can use a short code instead of typing a long album URL.
marketing.home.simple.updates.2.title: Wall links are shorter for TVs
marketing.home.simple.updates.2.descript: The wall can open from a shorter route, which is easier to type into a TV browser.
marketing.home.simple.updates.3.title: Business now uses billing credits
marketing.home.simple.updates.3.descript: Multi-event teams top up once, then spend credits on each Plus or Pro event they create.
marketing.home.simple.faq.1.question: Do guests need an app?
marketing.home.simple.faq.1.answer: No. Guests open a link, scan a QR code, or enter the album code in the browser.
marketing.home.simple.faq.2.question: Can I still use the live wall on a TV?
marketing.home.simple.faq.2.answer: Yes. The wall is now easier to open with the shorter wall route and the same event code.
marketing.home.simple.faq.3.question: What changed for business users?
marketing.home.simple.faq.3.answer: Business now uses prepaid billing credits, event-by-event spending, and a dedicated billing dashboard.
marketing.home.simple.faq.4.question: Can I start simple and upgrade later?
marketing.home.simple.faq.4.answer: Yes. You can start with the normal plans and switch into business mode when you need multi-event billing.
marketing.home.simple.sections.flow.titl: Three short steps. Real screens. No extra story.
marketing.home.simple.sections.flow.desc: Keep the homepage focused on the actual flow people need to understand before they buy.
Show what changed in the app
These blocks should become real screenshots or short loops from the actual product, not lifestyle photos.
marketing.home.simple.sections.updates.t: The new service model needs a clear public explanation
marketing.home.simple.sections.updates.d: This section replaces long copy blocks with short updates people can scan in a few seconds.
marketing.home.simple.sections.faq.title: Keep the answers short too
marketing.home.simple.sections.cta.title: One page for guests. One page for pricing. One page for business.
marketing.home.simple.sections.cta.descr: That is enough for launch. Use the screenshots and short clips to do the explaining, then let the app do the rest.
marketing.pricing.simple.hero.title: Pick the plan in seconds, then show what guests actually get.
marketing.pricing.simple.hero.descriptio: Keep this page simple: one clean plan comparison, one visual example for each use case, and one clear path into business billing when people need multiple events.
One headline, one short summary, a few proof points, and one action each.
marketing.pricing.simple.examples.1.desc: Use this example space for a simple event with album, wall, and fast guest upload.
marketing.pricing.simple.examples.2.desc: Use this space to show a fuller setup with branded wall, album, and sharing moments.
marketing.pricing.simple.examples.3.desc: Use this space to explain why a team would move into Business and billing credits.
marketing.pricing.simple.sections.exampl: Use examples instead of more sales text
marketing.pricing.simple.sections.compar: This should stay scannable on desktop and mobile without extra dialogs or explanation cards.
marketing.pricing.simple.sections.busine: Teams need billing, examples, and a real dashboard preview.
The business page should show credit billing, event-by-event usage, and what the team dashboard looks like. Keep it practical and visual.
marketing.businesses.simple.hero.title: Explain business billing with examples, not a wall of text.
marketing.businesses.simple.hero.descrip: Business should feel simple: top up credits, create events, and keep the same event-based cost model as everyone else. Show the dashboard, the billing page, and the event flow clearly.
marketing.businesses.simple.actions.sign: Sign in to use business mode
marketing.businesses.simple.flow.1.title: Switch into business mode once
marketing.businesses.simple.flow.1.descr: The account becomes multi-event, keeps the same paid event model, and unlocks billing credits.
marketing.businesses.simple.flow.2.title: Top up billing credits
marketing.businesses.simple.flow.2.descr: Teams preload credits, then spend them per event instead of paying a consumer checkout every time.
marketing.businesses.simple.flow.3.title: Create paid events for clients
marketing.businesses.simple.flow.3.descr: Each new Plus or Pro event consumes credits, which keeps usage aligned with the real event cost.
marketing.businesses.simple.sections.flo: Three things teams need to understand immediately
No nested promo cards. Just the model, the screenshots, and the action.
marketing.businesses.simple.examples.1.d: Use this space to show what a 100-credit pack covers for your most common event type.
At :cost credits per :plan event, 100 credits covers about :count events before bonuses.
marketing.businesses.simple.examples.2.t: Bonus credits make the math easier
marketing.businesses.simple.examples.2.d: Use this space to explain the current launch bonus and how it changes the effective event count.
A 100-credit top-up currently grants :total total credits with the launch bonus.
marketing.businesses.simple.examples.3.d: Use this space to explain the Pro credit cost with one simple example.
:plan costs :cost credits per event, so teams can forecast spend without another pricing model.
marketing.businesses.simple.sections.exa: Do the credit math in public
Give teams one or two concrete scenarios so they understand the wallet model without reading a policy page.
marketing.businesses.simple.sections.exp: Business buyers still need to see what guests and clients will actually open.
marketing.businesses.simple.experience.a: Show the 4-character album code screen and the mobile upload page so teams know guests can still join quickly.
marketing.businesses.simple.experience.w: Wall access for venues and TVs
Show the shorter wall route and the live wall itself so the venue setup looks easy and fast.
marketing.businesses.simple.sections.bil: Keep the top-up area simple too
Choose a pack, show the current payout clearly, and let the user move forward.
marketing.businesses.simple.billing.intr: One credit equals one euro. Business events use credits against Plus and Pro, so the billing page should feel predictable, not special-case or unlimited.
marketing.businesses.simple.billing.swit: Switch to business mode first, then top up.

dashboard.business.portfolio.description: Find the right workspace fast, then jump into the next action.

dashboard.business.events.hero.descripti: Every business workspace in one place, with direct routes into workspace, media, billing, and settings.
dashboard.business.events.metrics.events: All owned workspaces in the business account.
dashboard.business.events.empty.title: No events match this view

dashboard.business.wallet.hero.title: Billing
dashboard.business.wallet.hero.descripti: Top-ups, bonus credits, and event spend in one billing ledger.
dashboard.business.wallet.summary.descri: One credit equals one euro in billing value.
dashboard.business.wallet.section.title: All activity
dashboard.business.wallet.empty.title: No billing activity yet

dashboard.business.wallet.top_up.title: Top up credits
dashboard.business.wallet.top_up.descrip: Pick a pack, choose checkout currency, and continue to Stripe.
dashboard.business.wallet.help.title: How billing works
dashboard.business.wallet.help.descripti: Keep business credits simple and reusable across paid events.
dashboard.business.wallet.help.top_up_on: Add credits in advance, then reuse that balance whenever you create a new paid business event.
dashboard.business.wallet.help.bonus_bal: Bonus credits stay in the same balance
Any bonus from a larger top-up lands in the same wallet, so you only need to track one credit balance.
dashboard.business.wallet.help.event_spe: When you create a Plus or Pro business event, the required credits are subtracted automatically and recorded in the ledger below.
dashboard.business.wallet.recent.title: Recent activity
dashboard.business.wallet.recent.descrip: The latest billing activity for this business account.

Soft ivory paper with warm wedding tones.

guests.page.title: Guests
guests.page.description: Move faster by working in one mode at a time: invitees, invitations, gifts, or check-in.
guests.sections.invitees.title: Invitees
guests.sections.invitees.description: Build the list, clean names, and keep RSVP status organized.
guests.sections.invitees.count: :count people or families on the list
guests.sections.invitation.title: Invitations
guests.sections.invitation.description: Choose the look, write the message, and track link activity.
guests.sections.ledger.title: Ledger
guests.sections.ledger.description: Track money, gifts, and notes without mixing it into check-in.
guests.sections.guest_list.title: Check-in
guests.sections.guest_list.description: Search quickly at the entrance and record who actually came.
guests.sections.guest_list.check_in_desc: Search fast, check who arrived, and see their table.
guests.sections.guest_list.public_page_d: Share this with the entrance team so they can search the list and mark arrivals.
guests.empty.invitees_description: Start with one name and add the rest later, or paste a list copied from your notes or spreadsheet.
guests.empty.filtered_description: Try a different filter or clear the search.
guests.invitation.studio_description: Choose a template, shape the wedding copy, and share a print-ready invitation flow from one place.
guests.invitation.choose_description: Start with the invitation style that feels right for this wedding.
guests.invitation.edit_description: Edit the actual blocks guests will read, instead of forcing everything into one generic text box.
guests.invitation.rsvp_note_placeholder: Add the RSVP reminder, closing note, or call to action.
guests.invitation.couple_description: Control the names that appear as the main invitation title.
guests.invitation.show_family_name: Include the family name after the couple names
guests.invitation.parents_description: Add parents or godparents when this invitation style needs them.
guests.invitation.fit_warning: :label is getting long for this template. It should still fit, but try to stay under :max characters.
guests.invitation.fit_error: :label is too long for this template. Shorten it to stay under :max characters.
guests.invitation.public_rsvp_descriptio: Share this if someone is not already on the list.
guests.invitation.default_message: Add the main invitation message here.
guests.invitation.recent_activity_empty: Invitation activity will appear here after you start sharing links.
guests.ledger.empty: Ledger entries will appear here after you add invitees.
guests.dialogs.guest.description: Start with the name. Everything else can stay on the default settings until you need it.
guests.dialogs.guest.advanced_descriptio: Use this only when you want to adjust attendance, invitation, table, or ledger details by hand.
guests.dialogs.guest.full_tables_locked: Full tables are locked until seats open up.
guests.dialogs.guest.invited_help: How many seats you are reserving for this invitee or family before they respond. If you are not sure yet, leave it at 1 and adjust it later.
guests.dialogs.guest.notes_placeholder: Example: Marcel + wife + 2 kids, close family friends, table near band.
guests.dialogs.guest.quick_description: Capture the essentials first so you can get back to the list quickly.
guests.dialogs.guest.sections.logistics_: Use this area for table placement and anything the team should remember.
guests.dialogs.guest.sections.attendance: Track what they answered before the event and what happened at the door.
guests.dialogs.guest.sections.invitation: Only fill this in if you need to record how the invitation was delivered.
guests.dialogs.guest.sections.gift_descr: Keep gift notes here if you already know them. Otherwise you can add them later.
guests.dialogs.import.title: Import guest list
guests.dialogs.import.description: Paste free text or upload a CSV/TXT file. Simple note-style lists also work.
guests.dialogs.import.placeholder:
Familia Popescu - 0722123456
Ion Vasile, 07126326123
James Webb - 4 guests - 0744556677
guests.dialogs.import.upload_help: Simple spreadsheet exports and copied note files both work here.
guests.dialogs.import.examples_descripti: One line per family or guest works best.
guests.dialogs.import.supported_descript: Names with phone numbers, copied note lists, and basic CSV/TXT exports are all accepted.
guests.dialogs.tables.description: Add the tables and seat counts here, then assign invitees to them from advanced details.
guests.dialogs.tables.empty: No tables yet. Add the first one above.
guests.dialogs.preview.description: Full preview of the invitation artwork.
guests.dialogs.check_in_info.description: Quick details for the entrance team.
guests.dialogs.check_in_info.full_tables: Full tables stay locked until seats open up.
guests.dialogs.ledger.note_placeholder: Flowers, jewelry, kitchen set, envelope note, or anything else you want to remember.
guests.dialogs.ledger.mode_description: Choose whether you are saving money, a physical gift, or both for this invitee.
guests.dialogs.delete.title: Delete invitee?
guests.dialogs.delete.description: This removes the invitee record and its ledger details from this event.

Enter your password to permanently delete this account and all of its data.
event_settings.page.title: Settings
event_settings.billing.admin_plan_descri: Choose the commercial plan for this event. Event storage and upload limits update when you save.
event_settings.billing.admin_paid_descri: Paid events stay available through the retention window instead of locking at the payment due date.
event_settings.billing.admin_due_date_de: Used to determine when unpaid events become locked.
event_settings.billing.admin_paid_at_des: Optional manual override. Leave blank to use the current time when marking this event paid.
event_settings.billing.admin_note_descri: Internal note for invoice status, payment method, or next follow-up. Customers do not see this.
event_settings.billing.admin_note_placeh: Example: Paid via bank transfer, invoice copy still pending.
event_settings.billing.checkout_success: Stripe checkout completed. Payment confirmation should appear here as soon as the webhook is processed.
event_settings.billing.checkout_cancelle: Checkout was cancelled. Your event is still unpaid.
event_settings.billing.owner_choose_desc: Pick the plan for this event and complete payment online in one step.
event_settings.billing.owner_upgrade_des: Because this is the same event, you only pay the difference between your current plan and the upgraded one.
event_settings.billing.plan_helper_upgra: Move from :currentPlan to :targetPlan and pay only :amount now.
event_settings.billing.business_descript: Switch this account to Business, top up credits once, and create Plus or Pro events without repeating the normal billing flow each time.
event_settings.billing.no_self_serve: Billing for this event is managed by the platform administrator. If you need plan or payment changes, contact support.
event_settings.billing.status.paid.label: Paid
event_settings.billing.status.paid.hint_: Access stays available until the retention window ends.
Payment is confirmed for this event.
event_settings.billing.status.locked.hin: Guests cannot upload until payment is completed.
event_settings.billing.status.pending.hi: Payment is still outstanding before the event locks.
event_settings.billing.status.unconfirme: A billing plan still needs to be confirmed for this event.
event_settings.billing.choose_plan_hint: Choose the plan you want to pay for from this event workspace.
event_settings.general.name_description: It will be shown across the app and to your guests.
event_settings.general.date_description: Set when your event is scheduled to start.
event_settings.general.timezone_descript: Search and select the timezone for this event.
event_settings.general.type_description: We adjust the experience according to your event type.
event_settings.general.wedding_details_d: Keep this light for now. These names help prepare wedding invitations later, and you can refine them anytime.
event_settings.general.wedding_details_h: Start with the couple names only if you want. Parents and godparents can be added later.
event_settings.general.family_name_hint: Keep the shared last name here and decide later if the invitation should show it.
event_settings.general.show_family_name: Show last name on the invitation
event_settings.album_permissions.title: Digital album permissions
event_settings.album_permissions.descrip: Control how guests interact with your digital album.
event_settings.album_permissions.view_de: Guests can open and browse the album.
event_settings.album_permissions.upload_: Guests can send photos, videos, and text wishes.
event_settings.album_permissions.downloa: Guests can save approved media to their device.
event_settings.uploads.title: Guest uploads
event_settings.uploads.description: Choose which guest upload actions stay available in the public album, including text wishes.
event_settings.uploads.hint: At least one media type must stay enabled.
event_settings.appearance.plan_advanced: Advanced branding is active for this event.
event_settings.appearance.plan_logo: This plan includes logo-level customization. Colors and custom backgrounds stay on Pro.
event_settings.appearance.plan_simple: This plan keeps branding simple. Upgrade to Plus for logos or Pro for advanced appearance controls.
event_settings.appearance.logo_descripti: Brand your event with a logo shown through public pages.
event_settings.appearance.logo_locked: Logo uploads unlock on Plus and Pro.
event_settings.appearance.display_langua: Localize the experience according to your audience. With Automatic, each guest sees the app in browser language when available.
event_settings.appearance.theme_color_de: Choose a theme color for your brand. We'll use that across public pages.
event_settings.appearance.welcome_descri: Set up an intro screen for guests' first visit, with a form to collect their info.
event_settings.welcome.dialog_descriptio: Set up a welcome screen that appears once for first-time guests.
event_settings.welcome.title_description: Enter the main title for your welcome screen.
event_settings.welcome.subtitle_descript: Add intro text below the title.
event_settings.welcome.background_descri: Set a background for the welcome screen.
event_settings.welcome.background_locked: Welcome screen backgrounds are available on Pro.
event_settings.welcome.form_description: Create a form to collect guest information before they proceed to your album.
event_settings.welcome.defaults.subtitle: Share your photos & videos with us!
event_settings.collaborators.description: Invite members who can access and manage this event.
event_settings.collaborators.sheet_descr: Prepare invitations for team members who help manage this event.
event_settings.collaborators.pending_not: Invitation sending will be enabled when the collaborator backend module is ready.
media.page.title: Media
media.page.description: Review uploads, filter fast, and take action without digging through a heavy dashboard.
media.feedback.copy_unavailable: Copy is not available on this device.
media.feedback.no_link: This upload does not have a file link to copy.
media.feedback.delete_failed: Unable to delete the selected upload right now.
media.feedback.delete_confirm: Delete this upload? This cannot be undone.
media.empty.none_description: Guest uploads will appear here as soon as someone shares a photo, video, or text post.
media.empty.filtered_description: Try a different attendee name, media type, or moderation status.
media.drawer.title: Upload info
media.drawer.description: Attendee details, file metadata, and quick actions for this upload.
media.bulk_dialog.title: Delete selected media?
media.bulk_dialog.description: This will delete :count selected uploads from the event.
media.attendees.title: Attendees
media.attendees.description: See who uploaded, how much they shared, and drill into their media.
media.attendees.empty_description: Attendees will appear here automatically once someone uploads to the album.
media.attendees.no_uploads_description: This attendee does not have any photos, videos, or text posts yet.
